description: Create a 'flicker' paradigm change blindness experiment in PsychoPy Builder at ~/PsychoPyExperiments/change_blindness.psyexp. The experiment should include an instructions routine followed by a trial loop that reads from ~/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions.csv (containing columns 'image1', 'image2', and 'trial_id'). Within each trial, the experiment must continuously loop a flicker sequence—Image A (240ms), Blank (80ms), Image B (240ms), and Blank (80ms)—until the participant presses 'space' to terminate the loop. Use the 'Airplane' image pair (Original: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/88/Change_Blindness_Airplane_A.jpg saved as ~/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli/airplane_a.jpg; Modified: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/9b/Change_Blindness_Airplane_B.jpg saved as ~/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli/airplane_b.jpg).
